capex_mentions.quote: Maintain our capital expenditures at about $1.1 billion
capex_mentions.context: 2026 capital efficiency focus; not explicitly AI-attributable, tied to technology and process improvements broadly

limitations: The $1.1 billion capex figure is not explicitly AI-attributable; it covers all capital expenditures, so it was not scored as AI investment intensity evidence.
AI investment intensity scored 3 (named programs, no quantified AI-specific spend); no dollar amounts are tied specifically to AI R&D or AI product build-out.

Narrative concreteness scored 4 based on named deployed platforms (Landmark AI solutions, LOGIX automation) with operational detail, but no quantified business results (e.g., revenue, efficiency %) are present in the excerpts.

Risk disclosure includes both AI-as-threat-vector (cybersecurity) and AI-as-competitive-risk mechanisms, supporting score 4, but no quantified risk exposure or named governance body is disclosed in these excerpts.
